characters.occupation_status: Mercer/Ashdown driver until chapter 17; Skyline nights after.

state_transitions.change: Falsifies Ashdown mileage.
Lorry near-miss reopens Klara trauma; Noor learns why.
Tells Eszter about Klara.
Returns cash, logbook, and keys; Oscar and Mercer drop him.
Starts Skyline nights.

characters.occupation_status: Ashdown housekeeper until chapter 13 cuts; then church room and later a one-room flat.

state_transitions.change: Sleeps with Beni; tells him about Lili and her ex.
Loses live-in room; needs 240 pounds by Friday for Mrs. Varga.
Learns about Nina's affair and money; ends it and bars Beni from the kitchen.
Shelters Bea.
Moves to her own flat; keeps contact practical.

characters.occupation_status: Society wife and charity patron in a private marital split.

state_transitions.change: Starts private cash work with Beni.
Has garage sex with Beni.
Jonas ends the affair after the broken-glass night.
Offers Beni Paris on Rue de Verneuil.
Loses Beni's silence and the remaining cash.

characters.physical_details: Trim, silver at the temples, tightly controlled.

state_transitions.change: Cuts pantry, shifts, and Eszter's room.
Learns the affair and logbook truth; fires Beni but shields kitchen staff and Eszter.
Tells Eszter what she saw and inferred.
Runs away, stays with Eszter, and returns before breakfast.
Refuses the gala portrait and leaves with Nessa Doyle's family.

characters.physical_details: Broad-shouldered, alert, suit cuffs worn shiny.
characters.occupation_status: Senior Mercer driver; later Skyline contact.

state_transitions.change: Takes over after the M4 near-miss and learns the Klara story.
Gets Beni Skyline work.

characters.occupation_status: Construction worker renting Beni floor space.

state_transitions.change: Won't keep Bea overnight but lends an umbrella and forces a safer plan.
Offers road tea and accepts slower repayment.

characters.physical_details: Red lipstick, cigarette hands, overbright energy.
characters.occupation_status: Dead before chapter 1; once a married mother in Beni's town.

timeline.story_start: Late September 2019 in damp London; Beni has been there nearly two years.
timeline.estimated_span: About four months, ending in January 2020.

seasonal_track.season: Early autumn, rain and late light.
Late autumn, colder nights, early dark.

key_events.event: Beni and Nina start sleeping together.
Beni alters the 12 November route record.
The M4 near-miss exposes the Klara truth to Noor.
Eszter loses her room and shifts.
Bea exposes the affair and runs.
Beni confesses at the gala and is fired.

geography.primary_setting: London: Belgravia, Tottenham, Hackney Wick, Holloway, and airport roads.

key_locations.name: Eszter's Holloway lodgings
key_locations.details: Church room, then a one-room flat above a barber shop.

distances: Belgravia to Hackney Wick is just under nineteen miles before traffic.
Tottenham to Belgravia takes about an hour by Tube or 35 to 50 minutes by car.
Heathrow roads and holding lanes define Beni's Skyline work.

world_rules: Hungarian EU citizens can work legally, but cash side work and domestic labor stay exploitable.
House diaries, paparazzi shots, route slips, and mileage books leave paper trails.
Moving a seventeen-year-old in secret carries legal and reputational risk.

power_structure.mechanism: Budget, payroll, housing, and social authority.
Private cash, secrecy, sex, and premium work access.
Rent debt and the power to evict.

objects.name: Altered route logbook
objects.origin: Beni changes the 12 November mileage chain.
objects.status: Introduced in chapter 9; handed to Oscar in chapter 17.

objects.name: Nina's cash envelopes
objects.status: First envelope appears in chapter 2; later ones reach 350 and 600 pounds; 170 pounds return in chapter 17.

objects.name: Silver lighter
objects.origin: Taken from Klara's car after the fatal crash.

debts.status: Reduced to 580 in chapter 2; still active in January.

debts.deadline: By Friday in chapter 13 to hold Eszter's room

income_sources.reliability: Good week only; ends after chapter 17.
Weekly base; rises to 350 and 600 when secrecy spikes.

knowledge_state.knows: The Mercer/Ashdown logbook is false and traceable.
The Klara crash still destabilizes Beni behind the wheel.
The Klara affair and crash story.
Nina and Beni crossed the line and bent the household schedule around it.
Beni used Nina-linked money to help with her room.
The affair, the false logbook, and the dirty cash trail.

environmental_constants: Luxury cars carry leather, perfume, phone-light, and paid hush.
The Ashdown house smells of polish, lilies, radiator heat, and food below stairs.
Tottenham rooms hold damp plaster, frying oil, bus vibration, and betting-shop light.
By winter, coats stay wet, windows sweat, and roads keep a skin of rain.
